name: Mary Yarborough Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cherries, drained pineapple, flour, and sugar in a bowl.
2. Cook the mixture until it thickens.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the Jello.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Add bananas and chopped nuts.
6. Pour into the prepared graham cracker crust.
7. Top with whipped cream and serve.
